title_pl: arctan_via_arcsin: ∃ t, ∀ x : ℝ, vc.im = arctan x via subst0
title_en: arctan_via_arcsin: ∃ t, ∀ x : ℝ, vc.im = arctan x via subst0
paper_quote: GPT Pro consult §3: arctan via arcsin(x/√(1+x²)) reuses full-domain arcsinTermℂ_open
informal_pl: Świadek arctanViaArcsinℂ przez subst0 arcsinTermℂ_full atanArgℂ; rzut .im przez Real.arctan_eq_arcsin.
informal_en: arctanViaArcsinℂ = arcsinTermℂ_full.subst0 atanArgℂ; .im projection via Real.arctan_eq_arcsin.
lean_target_signature: theorem arctan_via_arcsin_correct (x : ℝ) : ∃ vc : ℂ, ... ∧ vc.im = Real.arctan x
notes: SEALED 2026-05-08 by Aristotle, ~21 min. Strategy: rewrite via def, apply eval?_subst0 + eval?_atanArgℂ, extract bounds from atanArg_in_Ioo, apply arcsinTermℂ_full_correct, finish with Real.arctan_eq_arcsin. Both 077 (atanArg_in_Ioo) and 078 land cleanly. Framework lift: needs atanArgELℝ real-fragment compile + arcsinTermℂ_full env-irrelevance lemma.
